παρεκδέχομαι (Polyb., M. Ant., Orig.) 1 aor. ptc. παρεκδεξάμενος misinterpret Papias (2:12).

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

  1. Ant. M. Ant. = Marcus Aurelius Antoninus, II a.d.—List 5

Orig Orig , var. works, II–III a.d.—List 5

aor. aor. = aorist

ptc. ptc. = participle

Papias Papias , early Christian writer, II a.d.—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 774
